arts.ttl: Preview: Oxford United vs. Watford - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Oxford United and Watford, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Watford host Man City in FA Youth Cup semi-final at Vicarage Road on April 10
arts.sum: Free admission for season ticket holders as Hornets bid to beat the holders and reach the final.
